description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix strategy to run two jobs, build-cmake and build-bam, on multiple operating systems including ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, windows-latest, and ubuntu-20.04. The build-cmake job checks out the repository, prepares the environment, builds and tests the project in debug and release modes using CMake, and packages the release artifacts. The build-bam job checks out the repository and a specific version of bam, prepares the environment, builds and tests the project in debug and release modes using bam.
